message:
fix(fnp-python): match NumPy error message for invalid reduce out argument

Change error message from "output must be an array" to "return arrays
must be of ArrayType" to match NumPy's exact wording when an invalid
output argument (like a list instead of ndarray) is passed to reduce().

Fixes test: frompyfunc_live_callable_matches_numpy_reduce_scalar_where_and_direct_out

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
